//: Harness-only tsconfig. The app's root tsconfig uses jsx:"preserve" because Next.js performs the JSX transform at build time. When a harness runs a .tsx component directly under `npx tsx`, esbuild has no Next pipeline, falls back to the CLASSIC runtime and emits React.createElement into component files that (correctly) never import React — throwing "React is not defined". Selecting the automatic runtime here fixes that for the harnesses WITHOUT touching a single component. Used as: npx tsx --tsconfig scripts/tsconfig.harness.json <script>
